questions.text: A vector has both magnitude and:
questions.explanation: A vector quantity has both magnitude and direction. Examples: velocity, force, displacement.

questions.text: The dot product of two perpendicular vectors is zero.
A unit vector has magnitude equal to ________.
questions.explanation: A unit vector has magnitude 1. It indicates direction only.

questions.correctAnswer: The vector from origin O to a point P is called the position vector of P. It is denoted as OP⃗.
questions.explanation: If P has coordinates (x, y, z), its position vector is xi^ + yj^ + zk^
